overall.description: A third-person game scene depicting a lone character in heavy winter gear walking through a snowy, fog-blanketed mountain landscape at night. The character carries a lantern illuminating the falling snow and snow-covered terrain, creating an atmospheric survival scenario with limited visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain field with scattered pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow carrying a lantern, leaving footprints in the fresh powder

entered.detail: tall evergreen tree blanketed in heavy snow on the left side of the field
snow-laden pine tree visible through the falling snow on the right
distant pine tree silhouetted against the foggy darkness ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open snowy field at night, surrounded by scattered snow-covered pine trees. Heavy snowfall reduces visibility while the character's lantern illuminates the immediate path ahead, revealing fresh snow and the dark silhouettes of distant trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain slope with cliff wall on the left side

events.description: large rock cliff wall appears on the left side as the terrain becomes more mountainous

agents.ego_description: continuing along the snowy path beside the rock wall, navigating the uneven terrain

entered.detail: large dark rock formation covered in snow rising vertically on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more confined mountain slope with a massive rock cliff wall appearing on the left. The character walks alongside this geological feature while distant pine trees fade into the background, and the terrain becomes rockier under the snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain canyon passage with high walls on both sides

events.description: entering a narrow canyon with rock walls closing in on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking through the confined snowy canyon between towering rock walls

entered.detail: tall snow-covered rock wall forming the right side of the narrow canyon passage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow mountain canyon with high rock walls on both sides. The passage is tight and enclosed, with snow continuing to fall heavily. The left cliff wall looms closer as the character progresses deeper into the rocky defile.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast, snowy expanse that gradually narrows into a confined mountain pass. It begins with the character traversing an open field at night, where a lantern cuts through heavy snowfall to reveal scattered pine trees and a blanket of fresh snow. As the character advances, the open landscape shifts toward a steeper mountain slope, causing the distant silhouettes of the forest to fade into the gloom. The scene then tightens as a massive rock cliff wall emerges on the left, guiding the path along a geological boundary where the terrain becomes increasingly rocky beneath the snow.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character transitions from an open snowy landscape into the oppressive enclosure of a narrow mountain canyon. It begins with the character stepping into a rocky defile where high stone walls rise sharply on both sides. As the character progresses deeper into the passage, the space becomes increasingly tight and claustrophobic under a heavy fall of snow. The scene then shifts focus as the left cliff wall looms closer, further restricting the field of view and intensifying the sense of isolation within the rocky corridor.
